data.Name: Drogon DG2 - Development Concept
data.Description: Development concept for Drogon DG2 Concept Select, aligned with the official Drogon FMU model (equinor/fmu-drogon tutorial 26.0.0). FPSO-based offshore development with 4 producers (A1–A4) and 2 water injectors (A5–A6), targeting the Volantis Group (Valysar, Therys, Volon formations) across 7 fault-bounded regions. STOIIP ≈ 34.5 MSm³, GIIP ≈ 1.0 GSm³ (NorthHorst gas cap). 250 FMU realisations with one-by-one sensitivity design and OPM Flow dynamic simulation. History period Jan 2018 – Jul 2020; prediction period to Jan 2025. DST well test 55/33-1 (Jul 2015, max 935 Sm³/d oil). Peak field oil rate 14,259 Sm³/d (Oct 2018). Predicted RF ~40% at end-of-forecast.
data.Summary: FPSO-based development targeting the Volantis Group (Valysar, Therys, Volon) across 7 fault-bounded regions at ~1595–1694 m TVD MSL. 4 horizontal/deviated producers (A1–A4; A4 is multi-segment horizontal) and 2 water injectors (A5–A6). Prediction: LRAT-controlled producers (A1/A4: 4,000, A2/A3: 2,500 Sm³/d liquid, BHP limit 150 bar), water injection 6,500 Sm³/d per well (BHP 500 bar). Gas cap in NorthHorst region (GOC ~1640 m TVD MSL). Black-oil fluid model (DISGAS+VAPOIL), ref. pressure 310 bar at 1750 m. APS facies model with seismic conditioning drives reservoir property assignment. FMU workflow: ERT → RMS (geomodel + Eclipse grid) → OPM Flow. eCalc FPSO facility model for emissions: gas compressor, WI pumps (200 bar), ~9 MW baseload.

FacilityConcept.HostDescription: FPSO-based offshore production facility. eCalc model: single-speed water injection pumps (200 bar discharge), gas export compressor (PR EoS, polytropic efficiency 0.8), ~9 MW baseload + 2 MW booster pump. Fuel gas with CO2 emission factor 2.416 kg/Sm3.
FacilityConcept.Provisions: 2 contingent well slots for infill. Flexibility for future tie-in of additional templates. Dual WI pump configuration for redundancy.

WellTypes.Note: A4 has X-direction completions spanning multiple I-cells

RFTWells.Note: Defined at simulation start, kept SHUT for RFT pressure measurement

DrainageStrategy.InjectionStrategy: Water injection for pressure support via A5 (6,500 Sm³/d) and A6 (6,500 Sm³/d), BHP limit 500 bar. Injection pumps at 200 bar discharge (single-speed centrifugal). Total field injection: 13,000 Sm³/d. History period had 8,000 Sm³/d per well (16,000 total) for initial reservoir fill-up.

DevelopmentPhases.Description: Jan 2018: A1 online (RESV control, 4,000 Sm³/d). Mar 2018: A2 online. May 2018: A5 injection starts (8,000 Sm³/d). Sep 2018: A3 + A4 online → peak FOPR 14,259 Sm³/d (Oct 2018). Dec 2018: A6 injection starts. WCT rising from 0 to 0.58.

LRAT-controlled production (A1/A4: 4,000, A2/A3: 2,500 Sm³/d). Injection reduced from 16,000 to 13,000 Sm³/d. Oil rate declining as WCT rises: ~5,500 → ~2,900 Sm³/d. WCT 0.58 → 0.76. Pressure stabilised ~255 bar.
2–4 infill wells targeting isolated fault compartments
DevelopmentPhases.Trigger: Compartment connectivity confirmed by 4D seismic / tracer analysis

DrainageStrategy.AquiferSupport: Active bottom-water aquifer in southern regions. Aquifer influx modelled with Fetkovich analytical model. Partial pressure support in CentralSouth and CentralRamp.
DrainageStrategy.Tracers: 2 water tracers (WT1, WT2) planned for inter-well connectivity monitoring

ReservoirTarget.VolumeSource: simgrid--vol.csv (truth case, all zones × all regions)

ProductionTechnology.SandManagement: Frac-pack with gravel pack screens. Standalone screens as fallback for clean Valysar sand intervals.
ProductionTechnology.ScaleRisk: BaSO4 scale risk identified from formation water analysis. Scale squeeze programme planned from year 3.
ProductionTechnology.EmulsionRisk: Low - clean oil, low asphaltene content.
ProductionTechnology.CorrosionStrategy: Corrosion-resistant alloy (CRA) in well tubulars, chemical inhibition in flowlines.
ProductionTechnology.MeteringStrategy: Subsea multiphase flow meters (MPFM) per well. Topside allocation via test separator.
ProductionTechnology.WellAutomation: Subsea choke control with remote optimisation from onshore.
ProductionTechnology.WaterManagement: Produced water treatment to <30 mg/L oil-in-water. Enhanced treatment module on FPSO for environmental compliance. Re-injection considered for Phase 2.
